CREATE TABLE test_array (id UInt32, arr Array(Int32));
SELECT id, arrayJoin(arr) AS element FROM test_array;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id UInt32, value UInt32);
SELECT a.id, arrayJoin(a.arr) AS element, b.value FROM test_array a JOIN another_table b ON a.id = b.id;
CREATE TABLE nested_table (id UInt32, nested_arr Array(Array(Int32)));
SELECT id, arrayJoin(nested_arr) AS inner_array FROM nested_table;
SELECT id, arrayJoin(arrayJoin(nested_arr)) AS element FROM nested_table;
SELECT id, arrayJoin(arr) AS element FROM (SELECT arr FROM test_array WHERE id = 1);
SELECT id, count() FROM (SELECT id, arrayJoin(arr) FROM test_array GROUP BY id) GROUP BY id;
